use_codes.desc: TOPICAL TREATMENT OF CUTANEOUS LESIONS IN PATIENTS WITH CUTANEOUS T-CELL LYMPHOMA (STAGE IA AND IB) WHO HAVE REFRACTORY OR PERSISTENT DISEASE AFTER OTHER THERAPIES OR WHO HAVE NOT TOLERATED OTHER THERAPIES

indications.text:
Targretin® (bexarotene) gel 1% is indicated for the topical treatment of cutaneous
lesions in patients with CTCL (Stage IA and IB) who have refractory or persistent
disease after other therapies or who have not tolerated other therapies.

Targretin® (bexarotene) gel 1% is indicated for the topical treatment of cutaneous
lesions in patients with CTCL (Stage IA and IB) who have refractory or persistent
disease after other therapies or who have not tolerated other therapies.
